debug_info.goal:
f g : ℝ → ℝ
h₀ : ∀ (x y : ℝ), f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y
h₁ : ¬∀ (x : ℝ), f x = 0
h₂ : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f x| ≤ 1
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), |g x| ≤ 1

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  -- pick a point where f ≠ 0
  have : ∃ x0 : ℝ, f x0 ≠ 0 := by
    by_contra h
    apply h₁
    intro x
    by_contra hx
    exact h ⟨x, hx⟩
  rcases this with ⟨x0, hx0⟩
  have hx0' : 0 < |f x0| := abs_pos.mpr hx0
  intro y
  have hxy : f (x0 + y) + f (x0 - y) = 2 * f x0 * g y := h₀ x0 y
  have habs :
      |2 * f x0 * g y| = |f (x0 + y) + f (x0 - y)| := by
    simpa [hxy] using congrArg abs hxy.symm
  have hbound :
      |f (x0 + y) + f (x0 - y)| ≤ 2 := by
    have h1 : |f (x0 + y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (x0 + y)
    have h2' : |f (x0 - y)| ≤ 1 := h₂ (x0 - y)
    have : |f (x0 + y) + f (x0 - y)| ≤ |f (x0 + y)| + |f (x0 - y)| :=
      abs_add _ _
    have : |f (x0 + y) + f (x0 - y)| ≤ 1 + 1 := by
      exact le_trans this (add_le_add h1 h2')
    simpa using this
  have hgy :
      |2 * f x0 * g y| ≤ 2 := by
    simpa [habs] using hbound
  have hgy' : |f x0| * |g y| ≤ 1 := by
    have : |2 * f x0 * g y| = 2 * (|f x0| * |g y|) := by
      simp [abs_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm]
    have : 2 * (|f x0| * |g y|) ≤ 2 := by
      simpa [this] using hgy
    have htwo : (0 : ℝ) < 2 := by norm_num
    have := (mul_le_mul_left htwo).1 this
    simpa [mul_assoc] using this
  have : |g y| ≤ 1 := by
    have hx0le : |f x0| ≤ 1 := h₂ x0
    have hx0pos : 0 < |f x0| := hx0'
    have hx0nonneg : 0 ≤ |f x0| := le_of_lt hx0pos
    have : |g y| ≤ 1 / |f x0| := by
      have := (le_div_iff₀ hx0pos).2 hgy'
      simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc] using this
    have : |g y| ≤ 1 := by
      have hle : 1 / |f x0| ≤ 1 := by
        have : 1 ≤ |f x0| := by
          have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ |f x0| := by
            -- from |f x0| ≤ 1 we get 1/|f x0| ≥ 1; we need the other direction,
            -- so use |f x0| ≤ 1 to get 1/|f x0| ≤ 1 is false in general; instead
            -- use inequality |f x0|*|g y| ≤ 1 and |f x0|>0 directly
            sorry
        exact (one_div_le_one_div_of_le hx0pos.le this)
      exact le_trans this hle
    exact this
  simpa using this
